When this combination was heated under pressure, it was Ответ
 everything from combs to dolls and ping pong balls.

In the 21st century, we don’t think much about pots Ответ
 fired clay.
In the 21st century, we don't think much about pots made from fired clay.

This dish is Ответ
 beef, red peppers and herbs.
This dish is made with beef, red peppers, and herbs.

In the 1970s, it was popular to have candle-holders Ответ
 wine bottles.
In the 1970s, it was popular to have candle-holders made out of wine bottles.

She had beautiful earrings Ответ
 silver.
She had beautiful earrings made of silver.

Guess the material by its description.


a brown metal made of copper and tin
The material being described is bronze.
thin parts like thread that can be made into cloth
The material being described is thread, which can be made into cloth.
a strong metal that is a mixture of iron and carbon
The material being described is steel, which is a mixture of iron and carbon.
thin parts like thread that can be made into cloth
The material being described is fiber, which can be made into cloth.
an artificial material that can be shaped into many different forms and has many different uses; it replaces expensive materials
The material being described is plastic.

Complete the sentences with the given words:

contracts

lightweight

self-healing

strength-to-weight

synthetic



Ответ
, aluminium and steel are all commonly used modern materials.
Concrete, aluminium, and steel are all commonly used modern materials.

 ratio and is resistant to corrosion.
Titanium has a high strength-to-weight ratio and is resistant to corrosion.

Metal foams are a strong but Ответ

Metal foams are a strong but lightweight material produced by injecting a gas into metal.

 when heated, whereas most metals expand.
Nickel titanium contracts when heated, whereas most metals expand.
materials can repair themselves.
Self-healing materials can repair themselves.

 materials.
Composite materials are a combination of natural and synthetic materials.

For engineering purposes, materials can be Ответ
 into four key areas.
For engineering purposes, materials can be classified into four key areas.

Metals are used in everyday objects like cars and buildings and in larger Ответ
 like jet engines and space exploration.
Metals are used in everyday objects like cars and buildings and in larger applications like jet engines and space exploration.

Metals are used in everyday objects like cars and buildings and in larger Ответ
 like jet engines and space exploration.
Metals are used in everyday objects like cars and buildings and in larger structures like jet engines and space exploration vehicles.

 plastics.
The second category is polymers, which include plastics.

The most common ceramics are glass and clay.
